data.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): tag-release.sh bumps version fields in plugin.json and marketplace.json but does NOT update the dso channel ref to point at the new tag. Result: after release, tag v<X.Y.Z> exists on origin but marketplace.json dso channel ref still points at previous release — persistent desync, not just a window. Fix: update tag-release.sh to also rewrite .claude-plugin/marketplace.json dso channel ref to v<VERSION> as part of the bump commit; optionally switch 'git push --follow-tags' to 'git push --atomic origin main refs/tags/...' to close network-level window. ESCALATE: release process change requires user approval; exact fix location depends on tag-release.sh internals (not read in investigation).
